title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at ICICI Lombard - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at ICICI Lombard - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, ICICI Lombard in Jaipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About ICICI Lombard:
ICICI Lombard is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Lombard!
